patch.value: CONTEXT: settings.json is read on nearly every command; zod validation added ~38% per-command startup cost. DECISION: replace zod with a bespoke dependency-free settings-validator.ts mirroring safeParse semantics (type-check, strip unknown keys, success/failure). CONSEQUENCES: large startup win; no field-level error detail (bad field -> silent fallback to defaults, see pm-7tcw); the validator must be hand-synced with the PmSettings type when adding fields. EVIDENCE: src/core/store/settings-validator.ts; item pm-e1va; memory startup_perf_zod.
ADR: Dependency-free settings validator (replaced zod on the hot path)
Dependency-free settings validator (replaced zod on the hot path)
